description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image. In a global before_script run "apt-get update -yqq", "apt-get install apt-transport-https -yqq", add the sbt repository with "echo \"deb http://dl.bintray.com/sbt/debian /\" | tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sbt.list", import the sbt GPG key with "apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv 642AC823", run "apt-get update -yqq" again, install sbt and nodejs via "apt-get install sbt nodejs -yqq", and verify sbt version with "sbt sbt-version". Define a single test job in the default test stage that runs "sbt clean test". No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are required.
